title: More Zombies!
description: Adds more zombie types for a Real Apocalypse!
body:
# Welcome to More Zombies!
the title says it all! *Mostly...* This mod adds More Zombies!
## But wait theres more!
The Mod also adds other things such as, but not limited to...
- Armor!
    - Hazmat Suits.
- Items!
    - Beakers of the zombie infection.
    - Batteries for whatever needs them!
    - A working Flashlight!
- Some Blocks!
    - Crates for storing... *Stuff*
    - Traffic cones!
    - Research Station! For villagers! ***No structure in the village yet though...** MCreator Moment.*
- Zombies of course! With settings to tweak them!
    - Featuring an infection system with /gamerule!
    - Plenty of zombies to start an infection with!
       - **Viral Zombies**, which can give chase to players more effectively.
       - **Frozen Zombies**, which slow players upon hit!
       - **Prisoner Zombies**, that hit harder than others!
       - **Officer Zombies**, that have a chance to stun you with their baton!
       - **Ghouls**, Which are the strongest non-boss zombie!
    - Even boss zombies which really change things up!
       - ***The Brute***, The more basic boss of the bunch. Slow, Hits hard, and plenty of health to tank hits!
       - ***The Zombie Giant***, The Giant knocks enemies back with strong hits that also stun on hit.

![Alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/MSvyig2k/images/f386f259f2448adccebde671121c186f6dc332c6.png 'The Image with all the Non-Boss Zombies in it.')

ordin note- i guess le new zombies rely on my speed to draw em
